data.body:
## Test Triage Results

### tests/agents/ (Bash) — 9 files: ALL DELETE

| File | Classification | Rationale | .test-index source |
|------|---------------|-----------|-------------------|

| test-red-test-writer.sh | delete | Greps red-test-writer.md for keywords. No code executed. | plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md |

| test-reviewer-deep-verification-checklist.sh | delete | Greps code-reviewer-deep-verification.md for keywords. No code executed. | plugins/dso/commands/review.md |
| test-reviewer-dimension-names.sh | delete | Loops over 6 reviewer .md files, greps for dimension names. No code executed. | plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-*.md |
| test-reviewer-light-checklist.sh | delete | Greps code-reviewer-light.md for keywords. No code executed. | plugins/dso/commands/review.md |
| test-reviewer-standard-checklist.sh | delete | Greps code-reviewer-standard.md for keywords. No code executed. | plugins/dso/commands/review.md |

| test_sprint_replan_observability_contract.py | delete | Reads contract .md + SKILL.md |
| test_sprint_validation_failure_routing.py | delete | Reads SKILL.md, asserts on routing patterns |
| test_task_execution_template.py | delete | Reads task-execution.md, asserts on template content |
| test_using_lockpick_feature_intent.py | delete | Reads SKILL.md + HOOK-INJECTION.md |

### Summary
- **Delete**: 75 files (9 Bash + 66 Python)
- **Replace**: 1 file (test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py — 1 behavioral test among 10 change-detectors)
- **Keep**: 0 files

All tests follow the same anti-pattern: read source .md files via grep/sed (Bash) or Path.read_text()/open().read() (Python) and assert on string/keyword presence. None execute scripts, call functions, or verify observable behavior.
